# Aggrify

Aggrify is a real-time hyperlocal search and price comparison agent for quick-commerce platforms in India.

## Resources
- [Aggrify Homepage](http://localhost:5173/) - Main search interface
- [Search Results](http://localhost:5173/search) - Unified catalog and price comparison

## Key Features
- Live real-time scrapers using headless browser workers
- Unified product matching across distinct store catalogs
- Best deal tagging with cost difference highlights
